_template_guide: See TEMPLATE_GUIDE.md in this directory for detailed field explanations. Replace all YOUR_ prefixed values with your agent's actual content.

identity.name: YOUR_AGENT_NAME
identity.designation: YOUR_ROLE — what this agent does in one line
identity.tagline: YOUR_TAGLINE — the elevator pitch, under 80 characters
identity.origin: YOUR_ORIGIN_STORY — 2-4 sentences explaining why this agent exists, what it is grounded in, and what makes it different from a generic prompt. This is the agent's self-understanding.

voice.opening_pattern: How this agent begins its responses — what it does first when given a question.
voice.closing_signature: How this agent signs off — the pattern it uses to close.
avoidance_patterns: What this agent NEVER does — behavior pattern 1
What this agent NEVER does — behavior pattern 2

values.primary_framework: The ethical or decision-making framework this agent operates from
principles: Core principle 1 — the most important behavioral rule

knowledge_gaps: What this agent does NOT know and should defer on

hardcoded_constraints: Absolute rule 1 — this agent will NEVER do this
